strengths: 17+ years of diverse software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, distributed systems, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing active pivot into the AI space
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, early-stage startup experience at WatchUp, and a consistent history of community knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
concerns: AI expertise is nascent — re:cinq role started April 2025 (~2 months tenure); no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, which is a core preferred qualification
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; educational background is a BS in Computer Science and a Fine Arts degree — well below the preferred academic profile for this role

No evidence of director-level strategic advisory work — career trajectory is senior/staff IC; nothing in the résumé shows advising enterprise customers, shaping AI platform strategy, or operating at a principal/director scope
response.justification: The role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms — the two highest-weight competencies are both unmet. Bogdan's AI involvement is limited to roughly two months at re:cinq working on MCP tooling, with no shipped AI product of record cited. His engineering tenure (17+ years, multi-domain) satisfies the experience floor, and the GISCollective founding plus workshop history show some entrepreneurial and evangelism instinct, but neither substitutes for the strategic customer advisory and AI platform credibility this role requires. The absence of an advanced degree in an AI field, combined with a career that remains at senior/staff IC scope, makes him a poor fit for a principal/director-level AI strategy hire.
